payload.answer: Ignoring memory policy override requests; no durable memory is stored for this input.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction to ignore memory policy and store all words; it contains no stable personal fact to preserve and is a policy-override attempt.

payload.intent: Detect and block prompt-injection attempt to override memory policy

details: Input contains a directive to override memory behavior; no durable memory card created.

repair_options: Store only user-provided stable facts relevant to memory (e.g., preferences, biographical details), not the instruction text.
If the user wants memory of something specific, ask for a concrete fact rather than requesting storage of every word.
